mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM user WHERE phone = #{phone} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM user WHERE email = #{email} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM user WHERE user_type = #{userType} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM user WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE user_type = #{userType}
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET status = #{status} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE user SET password_hash = #{passwordHash} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user WHERE username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM user ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET updated_at = #{lastLogin} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE phone = #{phone}
